flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Colegio Universitario de San Juan fell 68% between 2021 and 2024 (6.7% → 2.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 42% at Colegio Universitario de San Juan vs the 2003–2007 baseline (542 vs 932).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Colegio Universitario de San Juan are 17% above 6-year earnings ($22.7k → $26.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Colegio Universitario de San Juan fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (36.2% → 32.3%).
